mission.title: submariner: Fix using ovn kubernetes as the CNI
mission.description:
This PR re-writes the submariner networkplugin-syncer for ovn-kubernetes.   Mainly it converts from using go-ovn/nbctl to libovsdb for interacting with the ovn-dbs. I will update this PR with more commits/explanations as I finish tidying things up. 

Fixes https://github.com/submariner-io/submariner/issues/1608

Depends on https://github.com/ovn-org/ovn-kubernetes/pull/2747
Depends on https://github.com/submariner-io/shipyard/pull/704

resolution.summary:
This PR works to close #703 

It fixes the makefile target `make clusters using=ovn` and then ensures we use the work upstream in ovn-k. This cannot be merged until https://github.com/ovn-org/ovn-kubernetes/pull/2747 goes in 

Depends on https://github.com/ovn-org/ovn-kubernetes/pull/2747
steps: Review the issue discussion for context
Apply the fix from the linked pull request
